briefdescription.para: AES minimum tag length in bytes.
AES NIST recommended minimum tag length in bytes.
AES maximum tag length in bytes.
AES-CCM minimum nonce length in bytes.
AES-CCM maximum nonce length in bytes.
Command ID for AES operation command.
Command ID for AES KAT command.
Maximum number of commands supported by AES module.
Select this mode to run AES DPA KAT.
This file contains the AES definitions which are common across the client and server.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 am 07/16/24 Initial release am 08/01/24 Replaced enums with macros 1.1 am 01/20/25 Added AES CCM nonce macros am 03/14/25 Updated correct macro value of XASU_AES_CCM_MIN_NONCE_LEN
